use_cases: Dramatic delete/remove actions with visual impact similar to movie effects
Creative portfolio showcases requiring memorable interaction moments
Entertainment or gaming-themed interfaces wanting superhero-style animations
Confirmation dialogs or error states with cinematic flair
Loading completion animations for creative applications
ai_summary: A dramatic disintegration effect component inspired by the Thanos snap from Avengers: Infinity War. Uses SVG feTurbulence and feDisplacementMap filters combined with Framer Motion animations to create a particle-like dissolution effect when the wrapped content is clicked. The animation scales up slightly, then dissolves into particles before resetting, providing a memorable visual feedback mechanism for destructive or completion actions.
